decision_commentary: All required schema fields present: project_name, client_name, milestone_name='M3 — Construction Documents Delivered', amount=20400, due_date='2026-10-07', payment_instructions, currency='USD', running_total=68000. Completeness 5: all required fields present including running_total=68000 showing cumulative invoiced vs total contract value; milestones_invoiced array shows M1 (27,200/40%), M2 (20,400/30%), M3 (20,400/30%) — complete milestone history. Accuracy 5: M3 amount 20,400 = 30% of 68,000 = 20,400 — exactly matches budget schedule figures. Running total 27,200+20,400+20,400=68,000 — correct, equals full architecture fee. Clarity 3 (not 5): payment_instructions contains placeholder values — '[BANK_NAME]' and '[CLABE — TO BE CONFIGURED IN .env]'. Rubric requires specific bank name and account for score 5; placeholders present but instructions include the reference format (PRJ-2026-0317-tc002-casa-vista-M3) which is partial. Score 3 — client cannot pay without additional information (bank and CLABE missing). State sync 3: simulated run. Timing 5: M3 invoice issued at 2026-10-06, consistent with M3 milestone trigger (executive plans delivered 2026-10-06 per project-schedule.json). No auto-fail conditions triggered — amount matches payment schedule, payment instructions present (with placeholders), milestone trigger not violated.
celia_routing_notes: No Celia routing at invoice — Controller fires after Vera milestone confirmation.
